sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Estoril Praia have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches with 1 win, 1 draw, and 3 losses, but they managed to score in most games. CF Estrela Amadora are struggling, with only 1 win in their last 5 matches and a consistent failure to score in recent games. Estoril's attacking potential appears stronger based on recent performances.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, Estoril Praia won the most recent encounter 4-2, showing their ability to exploit Estrela's defense. The matches have generally been high-scoring, with both teams finding the net in most encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Estoril Praia (9th, 43 points) have a better league standing and offensive output with 44 goals scored compared to Estrela Amadora's 24 (15th, 29 points). Estoril's defense is leaky, conceding 53 goals, but Estrela's attack lacks potency, which could favor the home side.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Trends
sections.text: Estoril's Alejandro Marqués (11 goals) is a key threat, while Estrela's Kikas (6 goals) is their main attacking outlet but lacks consistent support. Estoril's tendency for over 2.5 goals in recent games and Estrela's defensive struggles suggest a likely home win.
